title: layia glandulosa var. heterotricha
intro: Layia glandulosa var. heterotricha, also known as California tidytips, is a flowering plant species native to the western coast of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations. Layia glandulosa var. heterotricha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
